entities.name: MANGO
entities.description: Fruit tree species studied for biomass and carbon sequestration potential in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: COCONUT
entities.description: Fruit tree species studied for biomass and carbon sequestration potential in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: POMEGRANATE
entities.description: Fruit tree species studied for biomass and carbon sequestration potential in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: CARBON SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of capturing and storing atmospheric carbon dioxide to mitigate greenhouse gases

entities.name: CARBON STOCKS
entities.description: The total amount of carbon stored in a reservoir, such as orchards

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of living organisms in a given area or system

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS MITIGATION
entities.description: Actions taken to reduce the emission of greenhouse gases into the atmosphere

entities.name: AGROECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural ecosystems where biomass and carbon stocks are quantified

entities.name: FRUIT ORCHARDS
entities.description: Systems of fruit-bearing trees used for carbon sequestration and GHG mitigation

entities.name: NATIONALLY DETERMINED CONTRIBUTION (NDC) TARGETS
entities.description: Climate action goals set by India to enhance carbon sinks and reduce emission intensity

entities.name: GHG EMISSION INTENSITY
entities.description: The amount of greenhouse gas emissions relative to the GDP

entities.name: CARBON CREDIT
entities.description: Tradable permits representing the removal of carbon dioxide from the atmosphere

entities.name: ALLOMETRIC EQUATIONS
entities.description: Mathematical equations used for non-destructive quantification of biomass and carbon stocks

entities.name: ALLOMETRY MODEL
entities.description: Models developed to estimate biomass based on specific tree measurements

entities.name: DEFAULT FACTORS
entities.description: Standardized factors developed under IPCC Tier-II methodology for biomass estimation

entities.name: CONVERSION FACTORS
entities.description: Factors used to convert biomass measurements to carbon stocks

entities.name: IPCC TIER-II METHODOLOGY
entities.description: A specific framework used to develop default factors for biomass estimation

entities.name: GOMPERTZ MODEL
entities.description: A mathematical model that best fitted the biomass data for mango and pomegranate

entities.name: CHAPMAN MODEL
entities.description: A mathematical model that was optimal for coconut biomass data

entities.name: MRV PROTOCOLS
entities.description: Measurement, Reporting, and Verification protocols essential for carbon payments

entities.name: CARBON CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of carbon found within the biomass of the species

entities.name: CARBON SEQUESTRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which carbon is sequestered per unit area per year

entities.name: COLLAR DIAMETER
entities.description: A physical measurement used as a reliable predictor for mango and pomegranate biomass

entities.name: DBH2 X H
entities.description: A calculation of diameter at breast height squared times height, used as a predictor for coconut biomass

entities.name: DEGRADED LANDS
entities.description: Lands on which the fruit orchards were established

entities.name: CHANGING CLIMATE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental shifts that influence the potential for carbon credits

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country implementing NDC targets for carbon sinks and GHG reduction
